allow: Bash(pwd && ls node_modules | grep -i vite-plugin-pwa && echo "=== fonts ===" && ls /c/Windows/Fonts/arialbd.ttf 2>/dev/null && echo found)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== winget ==="; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== choco ==="; \(Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== java ==="; \(Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== free space C: ==="; \(Get-PSDrive C\).Free/1GB)

PowerShell($sdk='C:\\Android\\Sdk'; Write-Output "=== contenido SDK ==="; Get-ChildItem $sdk -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "=== build-tools instalado? ==="; if\(Test-Path "$sdk\\build-tools"\){Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\build-tools" -Name} else {'aun no'}; Write-Output "=== platform-tools? ==="; if\(Test-Path "$sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"\){'adb OK'} else {'aun no'}; Write-Output "=== proceso instalador ==="; Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,@{n='CPU_s';e={[int]$_.CPU}},@{n='MB';e={[int]\($_.WS/1MB\)}})
PowerShell(cd C:\\SYB\\task-system\\frontend; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File build-apk.ps1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40)

PowerShell(cd C:\\SYB\\task-system\\frontend; \(Get-Content package.json | Select-String '@capacitor'\); Write-Output "--- instalando JDK 21 ---"; winget install --id Microsoft.OpenJDK.21 -e --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements --silent --disable-interactivity)

Bash(cd task-system/frontend/src && find . -type f -name "*.js" -o -name "*.jsx" | head -50 && echo "---BACKEND---" && cd ../../backend && find . -type f \\\( -name "*.js" -o -name "*.py" \\\) -not -path "*/node_modules/*" | head -50)

Bash('/c/Program Files/Microsoft/jdk-17.0.19.10-hotspot/bin/keytool.exe' -genkeypair -v -keystore release-key.jks -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -alias app-key -storepass 'App2024#Release' -keypass 'App2024#Release' -dname 'CN=MG Hogar, O=MG Hogar, L=Buenos Aires, ST=Buenos Aires, C=AR')
